name: developer
description: 소프트웨어 개발자를 위한 Claude Code 설정

steps.description: TDD 사이클에 따라 테스트를 먼저 설계합니다

workflowSteps: 기획: Plan Mode → 구현 계획 → 사용자 승인
검증: build, lint, typecheck, test all pass
roleDescription: 소프트웨어 개발 (풀스택, 프론트엔드, 백엔드, 데이터 엔지니어링)

security: No hardcoded API keys, secrets, tokens
Never use user input directly in SQL, HTML, or commands
Use parameterized queries, validate inputs at boundaries
codeStyle: Immutability: spread operator for updates, no mutation
Functions: max 50 lines, early return over deep nesting (max 4 levels)
Files: max 800 lines, split if exceeded
extensibility: Define contracts with interfaces/types before implementation
Extract config to constants/env vars (no magic numbers)
Single Responsibility Principle: one role per function/class
testing: No test interdependencies, no real API calls (use mocks)
